HeroSection.title: your own dream server network
HeroSection.description: Take total command of your server network. A unified platform built to help you deploy, manage, and optimize your entire infrastructure with effortless efficiency and professional-grade reliability.

HomeSections.manageDescription: Stop switching between multiple tabs and platforms. Control every node, service, and instance from a single, centralized dashboard designed to give you a bird's-eye view of your entire server network.
HomeSections.consoleDescription: Interact with your services instantly through a built-in, low-latency console. Monitor live logs, execute commands, and troubleshoot issues in real-time without ever leaving your browser.
HomeSections.filesDescription: Edit configuration files and manage your data directly through a built-in, high-performance web editor. No external clients required — just open the panel and start coding with full syntax highlighting.
HomeSections.databaseDescription: Browse your tables and inspect data structures with an integrated database viewer. Monitor your storage, verify entries, and manage your data across multiple instances without ever leaving your browser.
HomeSections.rolesDescription: Protect your infrastructure with a powerful role-based permission system. Define custom access levels for your team, ensuring every member has exactly the tools they need while keeping your core system secure.
HomeSections.setupDescription: Launch new services in seconds. Our automated engine handles everything: network configuration, dependency installation, and file synchronization. Get your server up and running without touching a single terminal command.

HomeNavBar.appearanceDescription: Switch between dark and light mode

SetupPage.successMessage: Your account has been successfully configured. For security reasons, please log in again.

ResetPage.resetSuccessMessage: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now log in again.

Roles.title: Roles
Roles.notSelectedDescription: Please select role to see its details and edit them
Roles.name: Name
Roles.invalidNameFormat: Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces and ().-_

unsavedChanges.title: Hold on a second!
unsavedChanges.description: You've got some unsaved edits here. If you leave now, they're gone for good. What's the plan?

deleteAlert.title: Delete this role?
deleteAlert.description: You're about to wipe out the role "{name}". This can't be undone and might affect some users.

Roles.adminDescription: Gives users all permissions (ignores other settings)
Roles.readServicesDescription: User can see all availabe services. For assigning specific service for user to see use user's aditional permissions
Roles.editServicesConfigsDescription: Allows user to edit settings of all available services
Roles.createNewServicesDescription: Gives user permission to create new services
Roles.deleteServicesDescription: Allows user to permanently remove services from the system
Roles.manageServicesStateDescription: Allows to start, stop and restart services
Roles.updateServicesDescription: User can perform version updates on installed services
Roles.readAllFilesDescription: Full access to browse and download all files in the system
Roles.editAllFilesDescription: Allows to create, rename, move and edit file contents
Roles.deleteAllFilesDescription: Allows to permanently delete any file or folder
Roles.readAppConfigDescription: Can view global system and application settings
Roles.editAppConfigDescription: Allows to modify global system variables and app behavior
Roles.readAllDatabasesDescription: Can view list of databases and their internal structures
Roles.updateAllDatabasesDescription: Allows to modify data and schemas in all databases
Roles.deleteAllDatabasesDescription: Allows to drop databases and remove all data
Roles.seeUsersDetailsDescription: Can view full profiles of other users
Roles.editUsersDetailsDescription: Allows to modify other users' information
Roles.createUsersDescription: Allows to invite and create new user accounts
Roles.removeUsersDescription: Allows to permanently delete user accounts
Roles.manageUsersDescription: Full administrative control over user accounts and their status
Roles.editRolesDescription: Allows to modify existing roles and their permissions
Roles.createRolesDescription: Allows to create new roles for the system
Roles.deleteRolesDescription: Allows to remove roles (only if not assigned to users)
Roles.applyRolesDescription: Allows to assign roles to specific user accounts

Users.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes and try to leave this page. What do you want to do?
Users.deleteUserDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
Users.resetPasswordDescription: Do you want to send a new temporary password to the user's email address?
Users.resetPasswordError: Cannot reset password (temporary password still active)

Errors.updateError: An error occurred while updating your data
Errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.message: Unexpected error occured during communication with server

Popups.errorCreatingRole: Error occured during creating new role
Popups.errorRolePriority: Error occured during changing role priority
Popups.failedRefreshRoles: Error occured during refreshing role list
Popups.fetchingUserRoleError: Error occured during fetching user role details
Popups.saveUserError: Failed to save user changes. Please try again.
Popups.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again
Popups.emailExists: This email is already in the system
